seo.title: Commission & Bonus Income Mortgages | Green Street Capital
seo.description: Mortgages for commission-based and bonus-heavy earners. Document variable income the right way. NMLS #2066586.

hero.heading: Commission and Bonus Income
hero.subheading: Help documenting variable earnings for sales professionals, managers, and bonus-compensated employees.

intro.heading: Variable Income Underwriting
paragraphs: Commission and bonus income is often averaged over two years and may require proof it is likely to continue. We help you assemble paystubs, W-2s, and employer verification so underwriters can use the income you actually earn.
If traditional averaging does not fit, we can also discuss alternative documentation options.

sidebar.heading: Documentation Tips
sidebar.body: Consistent history and clear employer breakdowns of base vs variable pay speed up approvals.

programs.title: Full-Doc Conventional
programs.description: When commission/bonus averages support the payment.

programs.title: FHA / VA
programs.description: Government options when eligibility and income documentation align.

programs.title: Bank Statement / Non-QM
programs.description: When variable income is better shown via deposits or other methods.

programs.title: Refinance
programs.description: Use documented income to improve an existing loan.

faqs.question: Will my bonus count?
faqs.answer: Often if it has a two-year history and is likely to continue—underwriters decide based on documentation.

cta.heading: Document variable income correctly
cta.body: Work with a loan officer who regularly underwrites commission profiles.
